title: The Effort Nobody Counted
summary: Chapter 27 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Effort Nobody Counted. Theme: Trying remains real even when nobody counts it.
sceneDescription: The effort nobody counted becomes marks, quiet repetition, and invisible labor held in memory.
